name: X_srh_chemoreceptor_cluster
description: X-linked srh (serpentine receptor, class H) chemoreceptor cluster on the C. elegans X chromosome. C. elegans encodes ~1300 chemoreceptor GPCRs in expanded srh/srz/srw/sra/srg superfamilies; the X chromosome harbours a large tandem block of srh paralogs in the central X arm. Paralogs share 70-95% nucleotide identity across 7TM coding sequence; recent duplicates require PSV-based disambiguation.
expected_copy_count: 100-150 srh paralogs in this X cluster
